$comment: Preset for sdlc-test-coverage-auditor. Stage 4 (Testing Strategy). Runs the project's coverage command, parses output, compares against configured threshold.

sub_agent.description: Executes coverage tooling and verifies threshold compliance.

gate_contribution.rationale: Stage 4 requires evidence of coverage at the configured threshold. This auditor produces that evidence.

notes: This auditor runs the test suite via Bash — ensure the project has a runnable test:coverage script.
Combine with gate-evidence-collector for full criterion coverage on Stage 4.
